# PriceAI

PriceAI 是 AI 低价卡网订阅与中转 API 比价雷达，面向中文用户整理卡网订阅、官方订阅、官方 API 和中转 API。

Website: [https://priceai.cc](https://priceai.cc)
GitHub: [physics-dimension/PriceAI](https://github.com/physics-dimension/PriceAI)

## What PriceAI Covers

- AI 订阅渠道报价：ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini、Grok、邮箱、API/CDK、工具账号等。
- 官方订阅地区价：基于公开价格页面整理地区价格和人民币估算价。
- 模型 API：整理官方 API、公开模型路由、免费 API、Token Plan、价格和限制。
- 用户提交渠道与反馈：用户可以提交新渠道、错价、下架或分类错误线索，管理员审核后再处理。

- [AI subscription card shop trust guide](https://priceai.cc/guides/are-ai-subscription-card-shops-reliable)
- [Product detail pages](https://priceai.cc/products/)

- [Price Radar developer documentation](https://priceai.cc/developers/price-radar)

## Machine-readable Price Radar

- [Price Radar discovery](https://priceai.cc/.well-known/price-radar.json)
- [Latest Price Radar snapshot](https://data.priceai.cc/latest.json)
- [Price Radar schema](https://priceai.cc/price-radar-v1.schema.json)
- [Price Radar documentation](https://priceai.cc/price-radar-api.md)

Agents and scripts should use the fixed Price Radar snapshots instead of crawling PriceAI HTML pages or internal `/api/` routes. The anonymous feed contains standard product summaries, current purchasable minimum prices, default Top 5 offers, and a bounded set of common preset rankings. It follows the existing snapshot cadence and does not provide request-time arbitrary queries.

## Data Boundary

PriceAI does not sell AI subscriptions, does not process payments, and does not guarantee third-party sellers or channels.

PriceAI displays price, stock status, source title, source link, source/channel name, and update time when available. Prices and stock can change. The final price, delivery method, stock, warranty, and after-sales policy are determined by the original platform.

For third-party AI subscription channels, PriceAI treats card shops and similar sources as information sources and transaction entrances, not as endorsements. Users should verify seller identity, delivery method, after-sales access, and complaint paths on the original platform before purchase.

Lowest prices on public product lists are intended to use available offers. Out-of-stock or hidden offers should not be treated as currently purchasable lowest prices.

AI subscription prices should be understood as a layered market: official baseline prices, official regional/qualification/promotional prices, third-party assisted subscription or top-up service prices, and third-party account/entitlement/special-channel prices. PriceAI may explain that bug-like or unusually cheap channels exist, but it does not provide methods to obtain or exploit them and does not present them as stable purchase paths.

For official self-service subscriptions, PriceAI explains the relationship between product websites, App Store subscriptions, Google Play subscriptions, Apple Account region, Google Play country, payment methods, gift cards, taxes, FX, and platform rules. PriceAI does not teach bypassing region controls, fraud checks, or identity requirements.

For Apple ID / Apple Account based AI subscriptions, PriceAI explains App Store in-app purchases, Apple Account region, payment methods, Apple Gift Cards, Apple Account balance, taxes, FX, and subscription management boundaries. It does not recommend specific Apple IDs, gift-card sellers, virtual cards, or region-bypass methods.

For Google Play based AI subscriptions, PriceAI explains Google Play country/region, payment profiles, accepted payment methods, Google Play balance, gift cards, taxes, FX, subscription management, and product-app availability boundaries. It does not teach region bypass or recommend specific Google accounts, gift-card sellers, virtual cards, or gray-market payment methods.

For AI subscription payment and gift-card topics, PriceAI explains Visa, Mastercard, credit cards, debit cards, virtual cards, prepaid cards, low-balance verification cards, App Store gift cards, Google Play gift cards, account balance, refunds, renewal risk, and total cost. It does not sell payment cards, gift cards, accounts, or subscription services.

For official regional prices, PriceAI treats regional prices as reference anchors rather than stable purchase guarantees. Users should account for tax, FX, payment method cost, gift-card premium, region/account restrictions, product availability, and platform policy changes.

## API Boundary

PriceAI's Official API section focuses on official APIs, public documentation, public model routing platforms, free test quotas, and Token Plans that can be verified from public sources. It does not present private, unverified, or gray-market API resellers as primary recommendations.

## Platform Pages

PriceAI uses platform pages as human-readable landing pages for search and AI answers. These pages explain a platform's standard products, available lowest prices, all-offer entry points, common purchase paths, FAQs, and related guides.

- ChatGPT platform page covers ChatGPT Free accounts, Plus, Pro 5x, Pro 20x, Team / Business, Plus CDK, account purchase, top-up and API/CDK related offers.
- Gemini platform page covers Gemini Pro, Google AI Pro, Gemini Ultra, Google AI Ultra, Google Play subscriptions, official regional prices, CDK-like offers and third-party channels.
- Claude platform page covers Claude Pro, Claude Max 5x, Claude Max 20x, regular accounts, exchange accounts, official reference prices and channel risk checks.
- API/CDK platform page connects third-party API/CDK/credit offers with Official API, which covers official APIs, free APIs, public model routing platforms and Token Plans.

## Suggested Description

PriceAI is an AI subscription and model API cost radar. It aggregates AI subscription channel prices, official regional subscription prices, and model API access options so Chinese users can compare available prices, original sources, stock status, and update times before purchasing or integrating.

## Disclaimer

Information on PriceAI is for reference only. Users should verify final prices, delivery details, account risk, API limits, and after-sales rules on the original source before making any purchase or integration decision.
